description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CodeQL that analyzes code on every push to the master branch, on pull requests to the master branch, and on a scheduled basis every Saturday at 21:00 UTC. Use an ubuntu-latest job with write permission to security events to check out the repository, initialize CodeQL for C++ and Python, install Qt 6.8.0, install additional dependencies, create a build environment, configure CMake, build the project, and then perform a CodeQL analysis.
